transcript.text: Hi, this is the assistant for Acme HVAC calling about your system.
Oh right, we used you two summers ago.
We have an opening for a tune-up this week, would that help?
How much would it cost? Actually you know what, that time works, book me in.
You've reached James. Please leave a message after the tone.
Hi, calling from Acme Roofing about the estimate you asked for last fall.
No thanks. Please take me off your list and do not call this number again.
